name: Tortilla Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 Inch Corn Tortillas, cut into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake tortilla strips in the oven at 325°F for 5 to 7 minutes or until crisp.
2. Puree tomatoes, onion, garlic and pepper in a food processor or blender.
3. Bring stock to a boil in a 2-quart pot. Stir in the tomato puree and cilantro.
4. Simmer on low heat for about 10 minutes.
5. Stir half of the tortilla strips into the soup.
6. Garnish with remaining tortilla strips and cheese.
Yield: 6 servings, 3 cups
One Serving = 1/2 cup Calories: 71 Protein: 4 g Fat: 3 g Carbohydrate: 9 g Fiber: 1.3 g Cholesterol: 5 mg Sodium: 313 mg Potassium: 210 mg Exchange: 1/2 Starch/Bread 1 Vegetable
